overlay.regclass_fail: Indicator: RegisterClassEx failed (code {0}) — continuing without the indicator.
overlay.createwin_fail: Indicator: CreateWindowEx failed (code {0}) — continuing without the indicator.
server.banner: === VoiceBridge (server) — ChatGPT voice bridge → active window ===
server.banner.hotkey1: Ctrl+Win        — start dictation; press again — stop + paste into the active window (local).
server.banner.hotkey2: Ctrl+Win+Y      — stop + paste + the text additionally stays in the clipboard.
server.banner.net: Network clients — connect via WS and dictate into their own active window (see --connect).
server.preparing_wait: Preparing ChatGPT — one second, press again in a moment.
server.busy_remote: A remote session is running (client #{0}) — local Ctrl+Win ignored (busy).
server.ctrl_start_busy: Start from network client #{0} ignored — busy (owner {1}, state {2}).
server.ctrl_cancel_prepare: Network client #{0} cancelled the start during preparation.
server.ctrl_stop_ignored: Stop from network client #{0} ignored (it does not own the current session).
server.stop_remote: ■ Dictation stopped (network client #{0}). The text will be sent to it for pasting.
server.start_ensure: ▶ Dictation start (owner {0}): preparing the ChatGPT tab, waiting for it to be ready…
server.start_wait_ext: ▶ Dictation start (owner {0}): Firefox is running, waiting for the extension to connect…
server.start_launch: ▶ Dictation start (owner {0}): launching Firefox, recording will begin once it is ready…
server.no_ff_noautolaunch: Firefox is not running and auto-launch is disabled (--no-autolaunch). Open ChatGPT in Firefox manually.
server.prepare_timeout: ChatGPT did not become ready in time (tab did not open / extension did not answer). Start cancelled — check Firefox and the extension, then press Ctrl+Win again.
server.ff_already_running: Firefox is already running — the ChatGPT tab will be prepared once the extension connects.
server.warmup: Warm-up: launching Firefox with ChatGPT (no recording — preparation only).
server.begin_recording: ▶ Dictation start (owner {0}): brought Firefox to front (0x{1:X}, foreground={2}), waiting for recording to start, will return focus to "{3}".
server.begin_no_ff_window: ▶ Dictation start (owner {0}): Firefox window with ChatGPT not found — focus not raised (recording may not start in the background).
server.hold_focus: Recording reported after {0} ms — keeping focus on Firefox for another {1} ms (capture needs time to start).
server.focus_back: Focus returned to "{0}" (focus was held for {1} ms).
server.text_sent: Text ({0} chars) sent to network client #{1} for pasting.
server.client_gone: Network client #{0} disconnected — text not delivered.
server.abort_no_recording: Recording never started (no "recording" signal) — cancelling the dictation (Cancel) and returning to the initial state.
server.inject_timeout: No text arrived after STOP within the allotted time — paste disarmed (a late text will not be pasted).
server.empty_result: Transcription came back empty (the recording was silence) — nothing to paste, disarmed.
server.cancel_prepare: ✖ Preparation cancelled (Ctrl+Win pressed again) — recording will not start.
server.cancel_transcribe: ✖ Transcription cancelled (Ctrl+Win) — the text will not be pasted.
server.discard_late_text: Text of a cancelled transcription arrived — not pasting, clearing the composer.
suffix.keep_buffer: — the text stays in the clipboard.
client.banner: === VoiceBridge (network client) — ChatGPT dictation into this machine's active window ===
client.banner.hotkey1: Ctrl+Win        — start dictation; press again — stop + paste into the active window.
client.banner.hotkey2: Ctrl+Win+Y      — stop + paste + the text additionally stays in the clipboard.
client.disconnected: ○ Connection to the server lost — reconnecting...
client.start: ▶ Dictation started — request sent to the server. Speak.
client.stop: ■ Stop — waiting for text from the server. Target=0x{0:X} "{1}"
inject.no_target: Target window is unknown or closed — paste cancelled.
inject.no_text: No text to paste (the extension has not sent anything yet).
inject.clipboard_fail: Failed to write to the clipboard — paste cancelled.
inject.fg_warn: Could not reliably bring the target to the foreground — trying to paste anyway.
hook.fail: Failed to install the keyboard hook (code {0}).
hook.active: Keyboard hook active: Ctrl+Win — start/stop dictation; Ctrl+Win+Y — stop + text to clipboard.
ff.already_starting: Firefox is already starting — repeated launch skipped (it would open a second window).
ff.not_found: firefox.exe not found (neither in the registry nor in the standard folders). Set the path in Config.FirefoxPath or open ChatGPT in Firefox manually.
ff.launching: Launching Firefox: {0} (no URL — the session restores its tabs, the extension prepares the ChatGPT tab).
ws.listen_fail_hint: If this is access denied — reserve the URL (one-time, in an admin console):
ws.listening: WS server listening on {0} — waiting for the extension to connect...
ws.client_connected: Client #{0} connected ({1}) — role will be determined by hello.
ws.recording: Extension: recording started — returning focus to the working window.
ws.ready: Extension: the ChatGPT tab is ready for dictation.
ws.no_firefox: Nobody to send '{0}' to: the Firefox extension is not connected.
wsc.send_no_conn: No connection to the server — '{0}' not sent.
wsc.inject: Text from the server ({0} chars) — pasting into the captured window.
usage.title: Usage:
usage.client: VoiceBridge --connect <host> [--port <n>]                    network client mode (connect to the hub).
usage.opt_noautolaunch: --no-autolaunch  do not launch Firefox automatically (by default the server launches FF with ChatGPT itself).
usage.opt_nooverlay: --no-overlay      do not show the on-screen dictation status indicator.
usage.opt_overlaycompact: --overlay-compact indicator without a label — icon-only circle.
usage.opt_overlaycolors1: --overlay-colors <k=RRGGBB,…>  indicator colors (hex, no #). Keys: bg background, border frame,
usage.opt_overlaycolors2: text label, wait waiting, rec recording/check, busy transcribing, err error.
usage.opt_lang: --lang <en|de|ru> UI language (defaults to the Windows language; otherwise English).
usage.ex_local: VoiceBridge                          locally on this machine (as before).
usage.ex_host: VoiceBridge --host +                 server reachable over the network (needs netsh urlacl + firewall rule).
err.overlay_colors_key: --overlay-colors: unknown key "{0}" (available: bg, border, text, wait, rec, busy, err).
